task_completion.description: Open SolveSpace and start a new sketch
task_completion.visual_evidence: The SolveSpace application window is open with a blank canvas or a new sketch started.

task_completion.description: Draw a T-shaped profile with 8 line segments
task_completion.visual_evidence: A closed loop consisting of exactly 8 line segments forming a T-shape is visible in the SolveSpace canvas.

task_completion.description: Apply horizontal and vertical constraints to all edges
task_completion.visual_evidence: Horizontal and vertical constraint symbols (typically 'H' and 'V' or specific line markings) are visible on the edges of the T-shape.

task_completion.description: Apply the four specific dimension constraints
task_completion.visual_evidence: Dimension constraints are visible on the sketch: 60 for the top flange width, 10 for the flange thickness, 8 for the web thickness, and 40 for the web height (or 50 for the total height).

task_completion.description: Center the web on the flange
task_completion.visual_evidence: The web is visually centered under the flange. This may be indicated by symmetry constraints, equal length constraints on the flange overhangs, or specific distance constraints.

task_completion.description: Save the file to the specified path
task_completion.visual_evidence: The SolveSpace window title bar displays 't_beam_profile.slvs', or a save dialog is visible confirming the file is being saved to '/home/ga/Documents/SolveSpace/t_beam_profile.slvs'.

integrity.description: Agent used the SolveSpace GUI to create the profile
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the SolveSpace graphical interface, tools, and menus, rather than terminal commands or text editors generating the .slvs file.

integrity.description: Agent genuinely drew and constrained the sketch
integrity.visual_evidence: The sketch evolves over multiple screenshots (e.g., drawing lines, then adding constraints, then adding dimensions), proving it was built step-by-step.

integrity.description: Agent did not open a pre-existing completed file
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent starts from a blank canvas and constructs the T-beam profile, rather than simply loading a finished file.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected output file path is /home/ga/Documents/SolveSpace/t_beam_profile.slvs. The required dimensions are: flange width 60 mm, flange thickness 10 mm, web height 40 mm (or total height 50 mm), and web thickness 8 mm. The tolerance for dimensions is 1.5 mm.
